summary: CP for underlying US-Iran attack question is at 50%, was declining from 55-60% to 45% before recovering. Second round of nuclear talks showed limited progress today. Meta-question CP ~45%.
content:
Key findings:
1. Underlying question CP trajectory: 55-60% (late Jan-early Feb) -> 45% (Feb 10-15) -> 50% (Feb 16-17)
2. Second round US-Iran nuclear talks in Geneva ended Feb 17 with "understanding on guiding principles" but no deal
3. US military buildup: 2 carrier groups (Lincoln + Gerald Ford), Pentagon preparing weeks-long operations
4. Iran closed Strait of Hormuz for live fire drills (escalatory)
5. Trump said "no rush" to make deal
6. Meta-question CP: ~45% from 106 forecasters
7. The question needs CP STRICTLY above 50.00% on Feb 28
